requirement_topic.en: Electrochemical Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Mauritania BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电化学安全——IEC 62619作为毛里塔尼亚BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電化學安全——IEC 62619作為茅利塔尼亞BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Mauritania does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation requiring IEC 62619 pre-shipment certification through a national conformity scheme equivalent to Saudi Arabia's SABER system or the EU Battery Regulation. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules. For Mauritania's donor/lender-financed BESS projects (World Bank IDA, AfDB, EU programmes), IFC Performance Standards and lender environmental and social standards routinely require internationally recognised IEC compliance as a condition of equipment acceptance. DNPQ (Direction Nationale de la Promotion de la Qualité — Mauritania's national standardisation body) may impose product conformity requirements; as of the dataset date, specific DNPQ mandatory requirements for BESS have not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources and should be verified directly with DNPQ before shipment.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，要求通过与沙特SABER系统或欧盟《电池法规》相当的国家合格评定制度进行IEC 62619装运前认证。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期基准。对于毛里塔尼亚捐赠方/贷款方融资BESS项目（世界银行国际开发协会、非开行、欧盟计划），IFC绩效标准和贷款方环境及社会标准通常将国际认可IEC合规作为设备验收条件。DNPQ（国家质量促进局——毛里塔尼亚国家标准化机构）可能规定产品合格要求；截至本数据集日期，DNPQ针对BESS的具体强制要求尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认，应在出货前直接向DNPQ核实。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，要求通過與沙特SABER系統或歐盟《電池法規》相當的國家合格評定制度進行IEC 62619裝運前認證。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期基準。對於茅利塔尼亞捐贈方/貸款方融資BESS項目（世界銀行國際開發協會、非開行、歐盟計畫），IFC績效標準和貸款方環境及社會標準通常將國際認可IEC合規作為設備驗收條件。DNPQ（國家質量促進局——茅利塔尼亞國家標準化機構）可能規定產品合格要求；截至本數據集日期，DNPQ針對BESS的具體強制要求尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認，應在出貨前直接向DNPQ核實。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Mauritania donor/lender project specifications)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications (may be referenced for smaller BESS units or modules)

DNPQ (Direction Nationale de la Promotion de la Qualité) — Mauritania national standardisation body; BESS-specific mandatory requirements not confirmed from public sources as of dataset date — verify directly with DNPQ before shipment
IFC Performance Standards — applied to World Bank Group projects; require internationally recognised IEC compliance for equipment acceptance

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements). The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in donor/lender project specifications or by international project owners in Mauritania. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求）。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被毛里塔尼亚的捐赠方/贷款方项目规格或国际项目业主接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求）。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被茅利塔尼亞的捐贈方/貸款方項目規格或國際項目業主接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (mandatory from August 1, 2025; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for Mauritania donor/lender project acceptance)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (voluntary; not equivalent to IEC 62619)

gap.en: Gap: Donor/lender project specifications for Mauritania BESS require IEC 62619 as the expected cell and module safety evidence. Chinese GB standards are not accepted as substitutes. Actions: (a) verify the current DNPQ mandatory requirements for BESS cells and modules — no confirmed DNPQ BESS conformity obligation has been identified but this must be checked before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules supplied to Mauritania BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme; (d) note that IEC 62619 testing at 50°C ambient versus standard test conditions may be discussed in project technical specifications — confirm with the lender technical advisor whether elevated ambient temperature test conditions are required.
gap.zh: 差距：毛里塔尼亚BESS捐赠方/贷款方项目规格将IEC 62619作为电芯和模组安全证据的预期要求。中国GB标准不被接受为替代依据。行动：（a）核实DNPQ针对BESS电芯和模组的现行强制要求——尚未发现经确认的DNPQ BESS合格义务，但出货前须核查；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至毛里塔尼亚BESS项目的所有电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意项目技术规格中可能讨论50°C环境下相对于标准测试条件的IEC 62619测试——向贷款方技术顾问确认是否要求提高环境温度测试条件。
gap.zht: 差距：茅利塔尼亞BESS捐贈方/貸款方項目規格將IEC 62619作為電芯和模組安全證據的預期要求。中國GB標準不被接受為替代依據。行動：（a）核實DNPQ針對BESS電芯和模組的現行強制要求——尚未發現經確認的DNPQ BESS合格義務，但出貨前須核查；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至茅利塔尼亞BESS項目的所有電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）注意項目技術規格中可能討論50°C環境下相對於標準測試條件的IEC 62619測試——向貸款方技術顧問確認是否要求提高環境溫度測試條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in donor/lender-financed project practice — IEC 62619 compliance is required by World Bank/AfDB project specifications; DNPQ mandatory regulatory obligation not confirmed from public sources as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is mandatory from August 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is equivalent to IEC 62619 for Mauritania project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation requiring pre-shipment IEC 62619 certification has been identified for Mauritania as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Mauritania donor/lender project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for project acceptance. Verify DNPQ current requirements before shipment and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, lender technical advisor before procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，毛里塔尼亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规要求装运前IEC 62619认证。然而，IEC 62619是毛里塔尼亚捐赠方/贷款方项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足项目验收要求。出货前核实DNPQ现行要求，并在采购前向项目业主及贷款方技术顾问确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，茅利塔尼亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規要求裝運前IEC 62619認證。然而，IEC 62619是茅利塔尼亞捐贈方/貸款方項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足項目驗收要求。出貨前核實DNPQ現行要求，並在採購前向項目業主及貸款方技術顧問確認IEC 62619證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: Environmental Ratings — IP65+ Enclosures and High-Temperature Derating for Mauritania Desert Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: 环境等级——毛里塔尼亚沙漠条件下IP65+外壳及高温降额
requirement_topic.zht: 環境等級——茅利塔尼亞沙漠條件下IP65+外殼及高溫降額

summary.en: Mauritania's operating environment for outdoor BESS installations imposes requirements significantly beyond standard IEC 40°C, IP54 baselines due to: (1) Extreme desert heat — Sahara ambient temperatures routinely 40–50°C in summer, with equipment surface temperatures potentially higher; (2) Severe sand and dust ingress — desert interior sites subject to Harmattan wind-driven sand and fine dust that penetrates standard IP54 enclosures; (3) Coastal salt fog — Nouakchott (capital, Atlantic coast) and Nouadhibou (northern port city) experience marine salt fog corrosion; (4) High solar irradiance — direct solar radiation significantly increases container surface temperatures beyond ambient air temperature. Donor/lender technical specifications for Mauritania energy projects typically specify minimum IP65 enclosure protection, extended temperature range operation (typically -20°C to +55°C or higher for electrical equipment), and salt fog corrosion protection (IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent). Standard Chinese BESS containers shipped to Mauritania without explicit environment-specific validation are at risk of premature thermal management failure, dust ingress into electronics, and accelerated corrosion.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚户外BESS装置的运行环境由于以下原因，对防护要求显著超出标准IEC 40°C、IP54基准：（1）极端沙漠高温——夏季撒哈拉环境温度常规40–50°C，设备表面温度可能更高；（2）严重沙尘侵入——沙漠内陆站点受哈马丹风携带的砂粒和细粉尘影响，可穿透标准IP54外壳；（3）沿海盐雾——努瓦克肖特（首都，大西洋沿岸）和努瓦迪布（北部港口城市）受海洋盐雾腐蚀；（4）高太阳辐照——直接太阳辐射使集装箱表面温度显著高于环境空气温度。毛里塔尼亚能源项目的捐赠方/贷款方技术规格通常规定最低IP65外壳防护等级、扩展温度范围运行（通常为电气设备-20°C至+55°C或更高）及盐雾腐蚀防护（IEC 60068-2-52或等效标准）。未经明确环境专项验证即发往毛里塔尼亚的标准中国BESS集装箱，存在热管理系统过早失效、粉尘侵入电子元件及加速腐蚀的风险。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞戶外BESS裝置的運行環境由於以下原因，對防護要求顯著超出標準IEC 40°C、IP54基準：（1）極端沙漠高溫——夏季撒哈拉環境溫度常規40–50°C，設備表面溫度可能更高；（2）嚴重沙塵侵入——沙漠內陸站點受哈馬丹風攜帶的砂粒和細粉塵影響，可穿透標準IP54外殼；（3）沿海鹽霧——努瓦克肖特（首都，大西洋沿岸）和努瓦迪布（北部港口城市）受海洋鹽霧腐蝕；（4）高太陽輻照——直接太陽輻射使集裝箱表面溫度顯著高於環境空氣溫度。茅利塔尼亞能源項目的捐贈方/貸款方技術規格通常規定最低IP65外殼防護等級、擴展溫度範圍運行（通常為電氣設備-20°C至+55°C或更高）及鹽霧腐蝕防護（IEC 60068-2-52或等效標準）。未經明確環境專項驗證即發往茅利塔尼亞的標準中國BESS集裝箱，存在熱管理系統過早失效、粉塵侵入電子元件及加速腐蝕的風險。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 minimum recommended for Mauritania (dust-tight + water jet protected); IP66 or IP67 preferred for coastal sites
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing — Salt Mist Cyclic Test (Sodium Chloride Solution) — relevant for Nouakchott and Nouadhibou coastal BESS sites
IEC 60068-2-68 — Environmental Testing — Dust and Sand (Harmattan dust storm conditions relevant for Mauritania desert interior)
IEC 62619:2022 — temperature derating and thermal management requirements for cells operating above standard conditions
Donor/lender project technical specifications — typically specify IP65+, extended temperature range (-20°C to +55°C or higher), and salt fog protection for Mauritania

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers typically offer IP54 to IP65 rated container systems. Standard production models are validated for 40°C ambient operation. Higher specification (IP65, -20°C to +55°C, salt fog protection) variants are available but must be explicitly specified and validated — they are not the default export configuration. Chinese manufacturers may reference GB/T 4208 (equivalent to IEC 60529) for IP ratings and GB/T 2423 series (equivalent to IEC 60068 series) for environmental testing. Certification under the relevant Chinese environmental testing standards may not be accepted in donor/lender procurement as a substitute for IEC 60529 and IEC 60068 compliance documentation — confirm with the lender technical advisor.
summary.zh: 中国BESS制造商通常提供IP54至IP65等级的集装箱系统。标准生产型号针对40°C环境温度验证。更高规格（IP65、-20°C至+55°C、盐雾防护）变型产品可供选择，但须明确规格并经验证——这些不是默认出口配置。中国制造商可能引用GB/T 4208（等同IEC 60529）的防护等级和GB/T 2423系列（等同IEC 60068系列）的环境测试标准。依据相关中国环境测试标准取得的认证，在捐赠方/贷款方采购中可能不被接受为IEC 60529和IEC 60068合规文件的替代依据——请向贷款方技术顾问确认。
summary.zht: 中國BESS製造商通常提供IP54至IP65等級的集裝箱系統。標準生產型號針對40°C環境溫度驗證。更高規格（IP65、-20°C至+55°C、鹽霧防護）變型產品可供選擇，但須明確規格並經驗證——這些不是默認出口配置。中國製造商可能引用GB/T 4208（等同IEC 60529）的防護等級和GB/T 2423系列（等同IEC 60068系列）的環境測試標準。依據相關中國環境測試標準取得的認證，在捐贈方/貸款方採購中可能不被接受為IEC 60529和IEC 60068合規文件的替代依據——請向貸款方技術顧問確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 4208 — 外壳防护等级 (IP代码) (equivalent to IEC 60529; Chinese manufacturers use for IP rating certification)
GB/T 2423 series — 电工电子产品环境试验 (equivalent to IEC 60068 series; Chinese manufacturers use for environmental testing)

gap.en: Gap: Standard Chinese BESS container designs validated for 40°C ambient and IP54 are not sufficient for Mauritania. Exporters must: (a) explicitly specify IP65 minimum (IP66 or IP67 for coastal sites) — verify with the manufacturer that the delivered units are validated to IP65; (b) specify and validate TMS for 50°C ambient operation — confirm with manufacturer that cells remain within safe operating temperature bounds at 50°C ambient at rated power output; (c) specify salt fog protection for coastal site BESS enclosures and electrical cabinets (Nouakchott, Nouadhibou); (d) specify dust and sand ingress protection for desert interior sites (IEC 60068-2-68 sand and dust testing); (e) confirm with the project's lender technical advisor whether IEC 60529 and IEC 60068 test reports are required, or whether GB/T equivalent certificates are accepted; (f) solar irradiance loading — outdoor BESS containers without shade structures in Mauritania can reach 65–75°C surface temperature; confirm whether shade structures or reflective coatings are required in project design.
gap.zh: 差距：针对40°C环境温度和IP54验证的标准中国BESS集装箱设计不足以用于毛里塔尼亚。出口商须：（a）明确规格为最低IP65（沿海站点IP66或IP67）——向制造商核实交付单元已通过IP65验证；（b）规定并验证TMS在50°C环境温度下的运行——向制造商确认在额定功率输出下电芯在50°C环境温度时保持在安全工作温度范围内；（c）为沿海站点BESS外壳和电气柜规定盐雾防护（努瓦克肖特、努瓦迪布）；（d）为沙漠内陆站点规定防沙尘侵入保护（IEC 60068-2-68沙尘测试）；（e）向项目贷款方技术顾问确认是否要求IEC 60529和IEC 60068测试报告，或接受GB/T等效证书；（f）太阳辐照热负荷——毛里塔尼亚无遮阳结构的户外BESS集装箱表面温度可达65–75°C；确认项目设计是否需要遮阳结构或反射涂层。
gap.zht: 差距：針對40°C環境溫度和IP54驗證的標準中國BESS集裝箱設計不足以用於茅利塔尼亞。出口商須：（a）明確規格為最低IP65（沿海站點IP66或IP67）——向製造商核實交付單元已通過IP65驗證；（b）規定並驗證TMS在50°C環境溫度下的運行——向製造商確認在額定功率輸出下電芯在50°C環境溫度時保持在安全工作溫度範圍內；（c）為沿海站點BESS外殼和電氣櫃規定鹽霧防護（努瓦克肖特、努瓦迪布）；（d）為沙漠內陸站點規定防沙塵侵入保護（IEC 60068-2-68沙塵測試）；（e）向項目貸款方技術顧問確認是否要求IEC 60529和IEC 60068測試報告，或接受GB/T等效證書；（f）太陽輻照熱負荷——茅利塔尼亞無遮陽結構的戶外BESS集裝箱表面溫度可達65–75°C；確認項目設計是否需要遮陽結構或反射塗層。

mandatory_status.target: Required by donor/lender project specifications and sound engineering practice for Mauritania conditions; not currently confirmed as a national mandatory standard in Mauritania
mandatory_status.cn: Standard IP54 / 40°C designs are the default manufacturing baseline; IP65 and 50°C-rated designs are available as options but are not standard export default

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese BESS container designs (40°C ambient, IP54) are not adequate for Mauritania's extreme desert environment. IP65 minimum enclosures, 50°C-ambient-validated thermal management systems, salt fog protection (coastal sites), and dust/sand protection (desert interior sites) must be explicitly specified and validated before procurement. Solar irradiance heating on outdoor containers adds further thermal loading — shade structures or reflective coatings may be required. Confirm with the lender technical advisor whether IEC 60529 / IEC 60068 test reports or GB/T equivalents are accepted in the project evidence package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标准中国BESS集装箱设计（40°C环境、IP54）不适合毛里塔尼亚极端沙漠环境。IP65最低等级外壳、50°C环境验证热管理系统、盐雾防护（沿海站点）及防沙尘保护（沙漠内陆站点）须在采购前明确规格并经验证。户外集装箱的太阳辐照加热增加额外热负荷——可能需要遮阳结构或反射涂层。向贷款方技术顾问确认项目证据包中是否接受IEC 60529/IEC 60068测试报告或GB/T等效标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標準中國BESS集裝箱設計（40°C環境、IP54）不適合茅利塔尼亞極端沙漠環境。IP65最低等級外殼、50°C環境驗證熱管理系統、鹽霧防護（沿海站點）及防沙塵保護（沙漠內陸站點）須在採購前明確規格並經驗證。戶外集裝箱的太陽輻照加熱增加額外熱負荷——可能需要遮陽結構或反射塗層。向貸款方技術顧問確認項目證據包中是否接受IEC 60529/IEC 60068測試報告或GB/T等效標準。

requirement_topic.en: ARE Type Approval and Electrical Installation Safety — IEC 60364 Compliance for Mauritania BESS
requirement_topic.zh: ARE型式批准及电气安装安全——毛里塔尼亚BESS的IEC 60364合规
requirement_topic.zht: ARE型式批准及電氣安裝安全——茅利塔尼亞BESS的IEC 60364合規

summary.en: Electrical installations for BESS in Mauritania are expected to comply with IEC 60364 (Electrical Installations of Buildings) as the internationally accepted framework for electrical installation safety, given that Mauritania does not have a published national electrical installation code as of the dataset date. Donor/lender project specifications routinely reference IEC 60364 and related IEC standards for the electrical design and installation of BESS and associated infrastructure. ARE type approval or conformity assessment for BESS electrical equipment (switchgear, inverters, protection relays, metering) may be required before commissioning; specific ARE type approval requirements for BESS have not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date and must be verified directly with ARE. Chinese switchgear certified under GB 7251 series must be verified for compatibility with IEC 60364 and SOMELEC's electrical installation requirements.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚BESS电气安装预计须符合IEC 60364（建筑电气安装），作为国际认可的电气安装安全框架——截至本数据集日期，毛里塔尼亚尚未发布国家电气安装规范。捐赠方/贷款方项目规格通常引用IEC 60364及相关IEC标准作为BESS及相关基础设施的电气设计和安装依据。BESS电气设备（开关柜、逆变器、保护继电器、计量）的ARE型式批准或合格评定在投入使用前可能须提前取得；ARE针对BESS的具体型式批准要求截至本数据集日期尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认，须直接向ARE核实。依据GB 7251系列认证的中国开关柜须核实与IEC 60364及SOMELEC电气安装要求的兼容性。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞BESS電氣安裝預計須符合IEC 60364（建築電氣安裝），作為國際認可的電氣安裝安全框架——截至本數據集日期，茅利塔尼亞尚未發布國家電氣安裝規範。捐贈方/貸款方項目規格通常引用IEC 60364及相關IEC標準作為BESS及相關基礎設施的電氣設計和安裝依據。BESS電氣設備（開關櫃、逆變器、保護繼電器、計量）的ARE型式批准或合格評定在投入使用前可能須提前取得；ARE針對BESS的具體型式批准要求截至本數據集日期尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認，須直接向ARE核實。依據GB 7251系列認證的中國開關櫃須核實與IEC 60364及SOMELEC電氣安裝要求的兼容性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364 series — Electrical Installations of Buildings (internationally expected electrical installation safety framework for Mauritania in absence of a published national code)
IEC 62271 series — High-Voltage Switchgear and Controlgear (expected reference for BESS HV equipment in project specifications)
ARE — type approval or conformity requirements for BESS electrical equipment (unconfirmed — verify directly with ARE before equipment procurement)
SOMELEC electrical installation and metering requirements (unconfirmed — obtain directly from SOMELEC)

summary.en: Chinese BESS electrical equipment — including medium-voltage switchgear, inverters (PCS), protection relays, and metering — is certified under GB 7251 (equivalent to IEC 61439), GB/T standards for PCS, and other national standards. GB 7251 series is closely aligned with IEC 61439 but minor differences exist. Chinese BESS manufacturers typically hold CE marking or IEC-equivalent certificates for export models; for Mauritania donor/lender projects, IEC 60364 compliance documentation and equipment certificates from internationally accredited test laboratories are expected. Confirm with the project's electrical engineer and the lender technical advisor whether GB/T-based certificates or IEC-based certificates are required for the specific equipment items.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电气设备——包括中压开关柜、逆变器（PCS）、保护继电器及计量——依据GB 7251（等同IEC 61439）、PCS GB/T标准及其他国家标准认证。GB 7251系列与IEC 61439高度一致，但存在细微差异。中国BESS制造商通常持有出口型号的CE标志或IEC等效证书；对于毛里塔尼亚捐赠方/贷款方项目，预计要求IEC 60364合规文件和来自国际认可测试实验室的设备证书。请向项目电气工程师及贷款方技术顾问确认特定设备是否要求基于GB/T或基于IEC的证书。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電氣設備——包括中壓開關櫃、逆變器（PCS）、保護繼電器及計量——依據GB 7251（等同IEC 61439）、PCS GB/T標準及其他國家標準認證。GB 7251系列與IEC 61439高度一致，但存在細微差異。中國BESS製造商通常持有出口型號的CE標誌或IEC等效證書；對於茅利塔尼亞捐贈方/貸款方項目，預計要求IEC 60364合規文件和來自國際認可測試實驗室的設備證書。請向項目電氣工程師及貸款方技術顧問確認特定設備是否要求基於GB/T或基於IEC的證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 7251 series — 低压成套开关设备和控制设备 (equivalent to IEC 61439 series; Chinese LV switchgear standard)
GB/T series for PCS (inverters) — Chinese energy storage converter standards; may not be accepted as IEC-equivalent in donor/lender specifications

gap.en: Gap: IEC 60364 compliance documentation for BESS electrical installation is the internationally expected baseline in Mauritania. ARE type approval requirements for BESS equipment have not been confirmed from public sources. Key steps: (a) verify ARE type approval or conformity assessment requirements for BESS electrical equipment (switchgear, inverters, protection relays, metering) directly with ARE; (b) prepare IEC 60364 series electrical installation design documentation as the project electrical engineering baseline; (c) confirm with lender technical advisor whether CE-marked or IEC-certified electrical equipment is required versus GB/T-certified; (d) Chinese PCS (inverters) for BESS: confirm whether IEC 62477 or similar inverter safety standard evidence is required in the project specification; (e) metering — SOMELEC metering interface and accuracy class requirements must be confirmed and met by the BESS metering system design.
gap.zh: 差距：IEC 60364合规文件是毛里塔尼亚BESS电气安装的国际预期基准。ARE针对BESS设备的型式批准要求尚未从公开来源确认。关键步骤：（a）直接向ARE核实BESS电气设备（开关柜、逆变器、保护继电器、计量）的ARE型式批准或合格评定要求；（b）以IEC 60364系列电气安装设计文件作为项目电气工程基准；（c）向贷款方技术顾问确认是否要求CE标志或IEC认证电气设备（而非GB/T认证）；（d）BESS中国PCS（逆变器）：确认项目规格是否要求IEC 62477或类似逆变器安全标准证据；（e）计量——SOMELEC计量接口和精度等级要求须经确认，并由BESS计量系统设计满足。
gap.zht: 差距：IEC 60364合規文件是茅利塔尼亞BESS電氣安裝的國際預期基準。ARE針對BESS設備的型式批准要求尚未從公開來源確認。關鍵步驟：（a）直接向ARE核實BESS電氣設備（開關櫃、逆變器、保護繼電器、計量）的ARE型式批准或合格評定要求；（b）以IEC 60364系列電氣安裝設計文件作為項目電氣工程基準；（c）向貸款方技術顧問確認是否要求CE標誌或IEC認證電氣設備（而非GB/T認證）；（d）BESS中國PCS（逆變器）：確認項目規格是否要求IEC 62477或類似逆變器安全標準證據；（e）計量——SOMELEC計量接口和精度等級要求須經確認，並由BESS計量系統設計滿足。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 60364 compliance expected in donor/lender project specifications and sound engineering practice; ARE type approval requirements unconfirmed — verify directly with ARE
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB 7251 and GB/T PCS standards are mandatory for domestic Chinese installations; IEC-equivalent documentation required for Mauritania donor/lender project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364 compliance documentation is the internationally expected baseline for BESS electrical installation in Mauritania. ARE type approval requirements for BESS electrical equipment have not been confirmed from public sources as of the dataset date — verify directly with ARE before procurement. For donor/lender projects, IEC-based or CE-marked equipment certificates are typically required rather than GB/T-only certificates. Confirm the specific evidence package requirements with the lender technical advisor at the bid stage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 60364合规文件是毛里塔尼亚BESS电气安装的国际预期基准。截至本数据集日期，ARE针对BESS电气设备的型式批准要求尚未从公开来源确认——在采购前直接向ARE核实。对于捐赠方/贷款方项目，通常要求基于IEC或CE标志的设备证书，而非仅有GB/T证书。在投标阶段向贷款方技术顾问确认具体证据包要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 60364合規文件是茅利塔尼亞BESS電氣安裝的國際預期基準。截至本數據集日期，ARE針對BESS電氣設備的型式批准要求尚未從公開來源確認——在採購前直接向ARE核實。對於捐贈方/貸款方項目，通常要求基於IEC或CE標誌的設備證書，而非僅有GB/T證書。在投標階段向貸款方技術顧問確認具體證據包要求。

requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity and SCADA for Grid-Connected BESS — ARE and SOMELEC Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 并网BESS的网络安全和SCADA——ARE和SOMELEC要求
requirement_topic.zht: 併網BESS的網絡安全和SCADA——ARE和SOMELEC要求

summary.en: Grid-connected BESS in Mauritania operating under ARE licensing and connected to SOMELEC's network require SCADA and communication systems that interface with SOMELEC's energy management and grid control systems. Cybersecurity requirements for grid-connected energy assets — including BESS — are increasingly required in donor/lender project specifications for Mauritania, particularly for projects co-located with national grid infrastructure. IEC 62351 (Power Systems Management and Associated Information Exchange — Data and Communications Security) is the internationally referenced cybersecurity standard for power system assets. World Bank and AfDB-financed energy projects increasingly include cybersecurity requirements in their technical specifications. Mauritania's specific national cybersecurity laws applicable to BESS grid-connected assets have not been confirmed from publicly accessible sources as of the dataset date. SCADA communication protocols — IEC 61850, DNP3, or SOMELEC-specific — must be confirmed with SOMELEC before BMS and PCS system design is finalised.
summary.zh: 在ARE许可下运行并接入SOMELEC电网的毛里塔尼亚并网BESS，须配备与SOMELEC能源管理和电网控制系统接口的SCADA和通信系统。针对包括BESS在内的并网能源资产的网络安全要求，在毛里塔尼亚的捐赠方/贷款方项目规格中要求日益增多，特别是与国家电网基础设施配套的项目。IEC 62351（电力系统管理及相关信息交换——数据与通信安全）是电力系统资产的国际参考网络安全标准。世界银行和非开行融资能源项目在技术规格中对网络安全要求日益增多。截至本数据集日期，毛里塔尼亚适用于并网BESS资产的具体国家网络安全法律尚未从公开来源得到确认。SCADA通信协议——IEC 61850、DNP3或SOMELEC专属协议——须在BMS和PCS系统设计最终确定前与SOMELEC确认。
summary.zht: 在ARE許可下運行並接入SOMELEC電網的茅利塔尼亞併網BESS，須配備與SOMELEC能源管理和電網控制系統接口的SCADA和通訊系統。針對包括BESS在內的併網能源資產的網絡安全要求，在茅利塔尼亞的捐贈方/貸款方項目規格中要求日益增多，特別是與國家電網基礎設施配套的項目。IEC 62351（電力系統管理及相關信息交換——數據與通訊安全）是電力系統資產的國際參考網絡安全標準。世界銀行和非開行融資能源項目在技術規格中對網絡安全要求日益增多。截至本數據集日期，茅利塔尼亞適用於併網BESS資產的具體國家網絡安全法律尚未從公開來源得到確認。SCADA通訊協議——IEC 61850、DNP3或SOMELEC專屬協議——須在BMS和PCS系統設計最終確定前與SOMELEC確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62351 series — Power Systems Management and Associated Information Exchange — Data and Communications Security (increasingly referenced in donor/lender BESS specifications)
IEC 61850 — Communication Networks and Systems for Power Utility Automation (SCADA communication standard — confirm whether required by SOMELEC)
ARE licensing conditions (cybersecurity requirements for ARE-licensed assets — unconfirmed as of dataset date)
World Bank / AfDB cybersecurity requirements for financed energy assets (increasingly included in project technical specifications)

summary.en: Chinese BESS BMS and PCS systems typically support IEC 61850, Modbus, DNP3, and CAN communication protocols. Chinese domestic grid-connected BESS cybersecurity requirements follow GB/T 36572 (Cybersecurity Technical Requirements for Power Industrial Control Systems) and related standards. These Chinese cybersecurity standards are not referenced in donor/lender Mauritania project specifications; IEC 62351 or project-specific cybersecurity requirements are applicable instead. Chinese BESS manufacturers exporting to donor/lender-financed projects should confirm which SCADA protocol SOMELEC requires and ensure their BMS/PCS supports it, and prepare cybersecurity documentation aligned with IEC 62351 or the project-specific requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS BMS和PCS系统通常支持IEC 61850、Modbus、DNP3和CAN通信协议。中国国内并网BESS网络安全要求遵循GB/T 36572（电力工业控制系统信息安全技术要求）及相关标准。上述中国网络安全标准不在毛里塔尼亚捐赠方/贷款方项目规格中引用；IEC 62351或项目专属网络安全要求适用。出口至捐赠方/贷款方融资项目的中国BESS制造商须确认SOMELEC要求的SCADA协议，确保其BMS/PCS支持该协议，并准备符合IEC 62351或项目专属要求的网络安全文件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS BMS和PCS系統通常支持IEC 61850、Modbus、DNP3和CAN通訊協議。中國國內併網BESS網絡安全要求遵循GB/T 36572（電力工業控制系統信息安全技術要求）及相關標準。上述中國網絡安全標準不在茅利塔尼亞捐贈方/貸款方項目規格中引用；IEC 62351或項目專屬網絡安全要求適用。出口至捐贈方/貸款方融資項目的中國BESS製造商須確認SOMELEC要求的SCADA協議，確保其BMS/PCS支持該協議，並準備符合IEC 62351或項目專屬要求的網絡安全文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36572 — 电力工业控制系统信息安全技术要求 (Chinese cybersecurity standard for power industrial control systems — not referenced in Mauritania donor/lender specifications)
Chinese BMS/PCS protocol support: IEC 61850, Modbus TCP, DNP3, CAN — confirm SOMELEC-specific requirements

gap.en: Gap: SOMELEC SCADA protocol and cybersecurity requirements for BESS grid connection have not been confirmed from public sources. Actions: (a) confirm the required SCADA communication protocol with SOMELEC (IEC 61850, DNP3, Modbus, or proprietary) before BMS/PCS firmware is finalised; (b) prepare cybersecurity documentation for the BMS and SCADA system aligned with IEC 62351 or the project-specific cybersecurity requirements specified by the lender technical advisor; (c) Chinese cybersecurity documentation (GB/T 36572) is not directly transferable to IEC 62351 requirements — prepare supplementary IEC 62351 aligned documentation for donor/lender project submissions; (d) data sovereignty and localisation requirements may apply for energy infrastructure assets in Mauritania — confirm whether there are restrictions on cloud connectivity, data storage locations, or remote access from China-based operations for BESS monitoring systems.
gap.zh: 差距：SOMELEC针对BESS并网的SCADA协议和网络安全要求尚未从公开来源确认。行动：（a）在BMS/PCS固件最终确定前与SOMELEC确认所需SCADA通信协议（IEC 61850、DNP3、Modbus或专有协议）；（b）准备BMS和SCADA系统的网络安全文件，符合IEC 62351或贷款方技术顾问规定的项目专属网络安全要求；（c）中国网络安全文件（GB/T 36572）不能直接转用于IEC 62351要求——为捐赠方/贷款方项目提交准备符合IEC 62351的补充文件；（d）毛里塔尼亚能源基础设施资产可能适用数据主权和本地化要求——确认BESS监控系统是否存在针对云连接、数据存储位置或来自中国运营的远程访问的限制。
gap.zht: 差距：SOMELEC針對BESS併網的SCADA協議和網絡安全要求尚未從公開來源確認。行動：（a）在BMS/PCS韌體最終確定前與SOMELEC確認所需SCADA通訊協議（IEC 61850、DNP3、Modbus或專有協議）；（b）準備BMS和SCADA系統的網絡安全文件，符合IEC 62351或貸款方技術顧問規定的項目專屬網絡安全要求；（c）中國網絡安全文件（GB/T 36572）不能直接轉用於IEC 62351要求——為捐贈方/貸款方項目提交準備符合IEC 62351的補充文件；（d）茅利塔尼亞能源基礎設施資產可能適用數據主權和本地化要求——確認BESS監控系統是否存在針對雲連接、數據存儲位置或來自中國運營的遠程訪問的限制。

mandatory_status.target: Increasingly required in donor/lender project specifications; Mauritania national cybersecurity law applicable to BESS not confirmed from public sources as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36572 mandatory for domestic Chinese grid-connected BESS; not applicable or transferable to Mauritania donor/lender project requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SCADA protocol compatibility with SOMELEC and IEC 62351 cybersecurity documentation are required for grid-connected BESS in donor/lender-financed Mauritania projects — Chinese GB/T 36572 documentation is not directly transferable. Confirm SOMELEC's required SCADA protocol before BMS/PCS firmware is finalised. Prepare IEC 62351 aligned cybersecurity documentation for donor/lender project submissions. Clarify data sovereignty and remote monitoring restrictions for China-based BESS monitoring operations early in the project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与SOMELEC的SCADA协议兼容性及IEC 62351网络安全文件，是毛里塔尼亚捐赠方/贷款方融资项目中并网BESS的要求——中国GB/T 36572文件不可直接转用。在BMS/PCS固件最终确定前确认SOMELEC所需的SCADA协议。为捐赠方/贷款方项目提交准备符合IEC 62351的网络安全文件。在项目早期澄清中国BESS监控运营的数据主权和远程监控限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與SOMELEC的SCADA協議兼容性及IEC 62351網絡安全文件，是茅利塔尼亞捐贈方/貸款方融資項目中併網BESS的要求——中國GB/T 36572文件不可直接轉用。在BMS/PCS韌體最終確定前確認SOMELEC所需的SCADA協議。為捐贈方/貸款方項目提交準備符合IEC 62351的網絡安全文件。在項目早期澄清中國BESS監控運營的數據主權和遠程監控限制。
